channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Democrats still don't agree on the seriousness of their political problem after election defeat
item.description: Nearly a month after a devastating election loss that exposed cracks in the very foundation of their party, Democrats remain deeply divided over the extent of their political problem — or even if they have one.
item.dc:creator: Steve Peoples And Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hunter Biden pardoned for tax, gun charges by President Joe Biden
item.description: “Hunter was singled out only because he is my son – and that is wrong,” President Biden said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Trump pick Kash Patel must prove he'll restore public faith in the FBI, a leading GOP senator says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Donald Trump's drive to upend the FBI was welcomed by Republican senators although it was not clear on Sunday how strongly members of the incoming majority party would embrace his move to install ally Kash Patel as the next director of the Justice Department's top investigative arm
item.dc:creator: KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiffany Trump's father-in-law Massad Boulos to become senior adviser on Arab affairs
item.description: "Massad is an accomplished lawyer and a highly respected leader in the business world, with extensive experience on the International scene," Trump wrote.
item.dc:creator: Ian Swanson, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic leader Ben Wikler enters the race to lead the national party
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Ben Wikler, chair of the Democratic Party in Wisconsin, said Sunday he has joined the race to lead the national party after an election that swept Donald Trump and Republicans to power in Washington.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Top political courtroom moments of 2024
item.description: Donald Trump, Hunter Biden, and Elon Musk were among just some of the well-known figures ordered to court in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump picks longtime ally Kash Patel to replace current FBI director
item.description: The president-elect plans to replace current FBI Director Christopher Wray with Patel, a close ally of the president-elect and former national security aide, has berated the Justice Department and the news media.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on the BRIC bloc of nations if they act to undermine US dollar
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Saturday threatened 100% tariffs against a bloc of nine nations if they act to undermine the U.S. dollar.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats sound alarm on West Bank under Trump administration
item.description: House Democrats are sounding early alarms that Trump's administration will lead to a vast erosion of Palestinian rights and undermine efforts to bring peace to the volatile Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP senator: Americans don’t care about FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-Tenn.), who was rumored to be on Trump’s shortlist to serve as Treasury secretary, said most Americans “don’t care” whether Trump uses the FBI to vet his nominees, something fellow Republican senators have demanded.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: The Supreme Court will hear arguments over Tennessee's ban on gender-affirming care for minors
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Advocates for transgender rights are turning to a conservative-dominated Supreme Court after a presidential election in which Donald Trump and his allies promised to roll back protections for transgender people.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN and GEOFF MULVIHILL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: DeWine signs bill restricting bathroom access for transgender Ohio students
item.description: Transgender students may use single-occupancy or faculty facilities with “controlled use,” according to the bill, Senate Bill 104.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Biden team briefed Trump transition on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team has received briefings from the chief architect of the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire deal under President Biden, a senior administration official said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Judge grants dismissal of Jan. 6 case against Trump
item.description: The move came after federal prosecutors filed a motion to dismiss both the Jan. 6 and Mar-a-Lago documents cases against Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC
